category_sources: source_facts.description says general purpose programming language in the ML family; source_facts.executables lists compiler/runtime tools.
display_name_sources: Official homepage at source_facts.homepage uses OCaml branding; source_facts.name is ocaml.
docs_sources: Official OCaml documentation pages include /docs and the latest language manual on ocaml.org.
repo_sources: Official OCaml GitHub organization lists ocaml/ocaml as the core OCaml system repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies OCaml as an ML-family programming language; source_facts.executables lists ocaml, ocamlc, ocamlopt, and runtime/compiler tools.
